title: Senior Radiologist at Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners
company: Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners:
Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners!
